About R & G

Our story, our passion

Our Story

Serving Happiness Since 2015

R & G Food Express started as a small home kitchen in Hyderabad with one simple goal — to serve fresh, authentic food to every household. What began as a passion project has grown into a full-scale multi-cuisine food delivery service loved by thousands.

We believe every meal should feel like home. That's why we use only the freshest ingredients, traditional recipes, and cook every order with care and love.

9+

Years of Service

500+

Menu Items

10K+

Happy Customers

4.8⭐

Avg Rating

Our Quality Promise

🌿 100% Fresh

Ingredients sourced fresh every morning from local markets

🧼 Hygienic Kitchen

FSSAI certified kitchen with strict hygiene standards

👨‍🍳 Expert Chefs

Experienced chefs with 10+ years of culinary expertise

R&G Food Express

Your one-stop destination for all types of delicious food.
